title: ER Model to Relational Schema Conversion
explanation: Shows how ER model entities and attributes are converted to database tables. Simple and composite attributes are stored directly; multi-valued attributes require separate relations.

title: Identifying Weak Entity Relationships
description: Converting Weak Entity Types to Relations
explanation: Weak entities include the primary key of their owner entity as a foreign key. The combination becomes the composite primary key for the weak entity relation.

title: Representing Cardinality in Tables
explanation: 1:1 can embed FK in either table, 1:N places FK on 'many' side, M:N requires a separate junction table with combined primary key.
